title: cli-port project config
description: Parameterizes a faithful port: source, target, the live oracle, and the determinism contract that makes byte-comparison possible.

repo.description: Path or URL to the source repo.

runtime.description: Runtime used to run the source, e.g. bun.

binary.description: Target binary name; should match source binary.

mode.description: live = run the source per case; snapshot = diff against committed goldens.

command.description: Shell command that runs the source CLI, e.g. 'bun src/index.ts'. Args are appended.

envPins.description: Environment applied identically to source and target to remove ambient entropy.

maskRules.description: Ordinal canonicalization rules applied to BOTH captures before byte-comparison.

mode.description: Nth distinct match -> <NAME:n> in first-seen order; preserves cardinality and references.

assertFormat.description: If true, assert the pre-mask token shape (regex/length) before substitution so format bugs still fail.

ordered.description: If true, also assert the ordering relationship among distinct matches (e.g. timestamps).

sandboxPathVar.description: Placeholder the temp sandbox path is rewritten to, e.g. <ROOT>.

corpus.description: Path to the test corpus directory (seed + adversarial cases).
